title: UserBackstoryArtifact
description: Schema for User Backstory learned artifact, containing user characteristics extracted from reviews.

overall_characteristics.description: Overall user characteristics from LLM analysis

influencing_characteristics_summary.description: A 2-3 sentence paragraph synthesizing the core factors that motivate this user's reviews

category_characteristics.description: Category-specific characteristics (if user reviews multiple categories)

num_categories.description: Number of categories the user has reviewed

categories.description: List of categories the user has reviewed
